scripts.generate-clients:sn45: bunx swagger-typescript-api generate -p https://sn45api.talisman.xyz/openapi.json -o ./src/api -n Sn45Api --api-class-name Sn45Api
scripts.generate-clients:tda: bunx swagger-typescript-api generate -p https://tda.talisman.xyz/openapi.json -o ./src/api -n TaoDataApi --api-class-name TaoDataApi
